ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cryptocurrencies" (
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "crypto_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the cryptocurrency */,
  "blockchain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the blockchain associated with the cryptocurrency */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Date when the cryptocurrency was launched */,
  "consensus_algorithm" TEXT /* Consensus algorithm used by the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the exchange */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for accessing exchange data */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is based */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange was founded */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the market data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data point */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the historical data */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "trading_volume" REAL /* Trading volume of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the trade */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trade (buy/sell) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of cryptocurrency traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the cryptocurrency at the time of trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., market order, limit order) */,
  "fee" REAL /* Fee associated with the trade */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis (e.g., trend, pattern, correlation) */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed (e.g., technical analysis, fundamental analysis) */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model */,
  "crypto_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cryptocurrency */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the prediction */,
  "prediction" TEXT /* Prediction made by the model (e.g., price, trend) */,
  "prediction_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_crypto_id FOREIGN KEY ("crypto_id") REFERENCES cryptocurrencies ("crypto_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_learning_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Machine learning algorithm used (e.g., linear regression, decision tree) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model (e.g., learning rate, number of hidden layers) */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of machine learning model (e.g., supervised, unsupervised) */,
  "model_complexity" TEXT /* Complexity of the model (e.g., simple, complex) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_trainings" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the training session */,
  "data_set" TEXT /* Data set used for training (e.g., historical data, market data) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model after training */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Data used for training the model */,
  "training_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for training the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_trainings_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES machine_learning_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_feeds" (
  "feed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data feed */,
  "feed_name" TEXT /* Name of the data feed */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data feed */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data feed is updated (e.g., real-time, daily) */,
  "feed_type" TEXT /* Type of data feed (e.g., real-time, historical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies (e.g., data, models, analyses) */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission granted (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, read data) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., data, models, analyses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
